name: Minecraft (Vanilla)
description: Official vanilla Minecraft server from Mojang. Pure, unmodified gameplay experience with automatic version detection and download.
author: GamePanel

env.name: Minecraft Version
env.description: Minecraft version to download. Set to 'latest' for the most recent release.

env.name: Server Jar File
env.description: File name for the server jar. Must end with .jar.

env.name: Server Name
env.description: Display name shown in the Minecraft server list.

env.name: Gamemode
env.description: Default game mode for new players.

env.name: Download Path
env.description: Override download URL for the server jar. Internal use only.

install_script.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Vanilla Minecraft Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

USER_AGENT="GamePanel (https://gamepanel.io)"

if [ -n "${DL_PATH}" ]; then
    echo "Using supplied download url: ${DL_PATH}"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(eval echo $(echo ${DL_PATH} | sed -e 's/{{/${/g' -e 's/}}/}/g'))
else
    MANIFEST_URL="https://launchermeta.mojang.com/mc/game/version_manifest_v2.json"
    MANIFEST=$(curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s "${MANIFEST_URL}")

    if [ "${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
        MINECRAFT_VERSION=$(echo "${MANIFEST}" | jq -r '.latest.release')
    fi

    VERSION_DATA=$(echo "${MANIFEST}" | jq -r --arg VER "${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" '.versions[] | select(.id == $VER) | .url')
    if [ -z "${VERSION_DATA}" ]; then
        echo "Version ${MINECRAFT_VERSION} not found. Using latest release."
        MINECRAFT_VERSION=$(echo "${MANIFEST}" | jq -r '.latest.release')
        VERSION_DATA=$(echo "${MANIFEST}" | jq -r --arg VER "${MINECRAFT_VERSION}" '.versions[] | select(.id == $VER) | .url')
    fi

    echo "Downloading Minecraft server version ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s "${VERSION_DATA}" | jq -r '.downloads.server.url')
fi

cd /mnt/server
curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} -L "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
echo "Download complete. Downloaded Minecraft ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}."

echo "Accepting EULA..."
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
